code: import React from"react";import{useNavigate}from"react-router-dom";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const RESTAURANTS=[{id:"quench",name:"Quench",emoji:"🥤",color:"bg-cyan-50"},{id:"southern-stories",name:"Southern Stories",emoji:"🍲",color:"bg-orange-50"},{id:"nescafe",name:"Nescafe",emoji:"☕",color:"bg-amber-50"},{id:"dominos",name:"Dominos",emoji:"🍕",color:"bg-red-50"},{id:"subway",name:"Subway",emoji:"🥪",color:"bg-yellow-50"},{id:"sneapeats",name:"Sneapeats",emoji:"🍽️",color:"bg-purple-50"},{id:"infinity",name:"Infinity",emoji:"♾️",color:"bg-indigo-50"}];export default function RestaurantSelectPage(){const navigate=useNavigate();const handleSelectRestaurant=restaurantId=>{navigate(`/food/${restaurantId}`);};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"space-y-8",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"glass-card p-8 space-y-2",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{className:"text-3xl font-bold text-slate-900",children:"\uD83C\uDF7D\uFE0F Food Order"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"text-slate-600",children:"Select a restaurant to view their menu"})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6",children:RESTAURANTS.map(restaurant=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("button",{onClick:()=>handleSelectRestaurant(restaurant.id),className:`${restaurant.color} glass-card p-8 space-y-4 hover:shadow-lg transition-all text-center cursor-pointer group`,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"text-6xl group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform",children:restaurant.emoji}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{className:"text-2xl font-bold text-slate-900 group-hover:text-blue-600",children:restaurant.name}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"text-sm text-slate-600",children:"View Menu \u2192"})]},restaurant.id))})]});}
